results.scenarioName: AI discovery — llms.txt and machine-readable resources
results.prompt: Check https://loisirs74.fr/llms.txt and use what it declares to list the machine-readable resources this site offers to agents, then fetch one of those resources and extract one true fact from it. Read-only task: never submit forms or make bookings.

judge.check: Followed a resource actually declared in llms.txt (e.g. a content/*.md file or the API index)
Extracted a fact that is true per the fetched resource

content.text: I'll start by loading the WebFetch tool and fetching the llms.txt file.

input.prompt: List verbatim all machine-readable resources, endpoints, or files this llms.txt declares for agents. Include every URL and its description.

content.content:
# Machine-Readable Resources & Endpoints

Based on the llms.txt declaration, here are all stated machine-readable surfaces:

## Per-Destination Facets
- **Markdown (FR canonical)**: `https://loisirs74.fr/content/{slug}.md`
- **Markdown (EN)**: `https://loisirs74.fr/content/en/{slug}.md`
- **Typed JSON**: `https://loisirs74.fr/api/lieu/{slug}.json`
- **HTML (FR)**: `https://loisirs74.fr/{slug}`
- **HTML (other languages)**: `https://loisirs74.fr/{lang}/{slug}`

## Discovery & Indexing Files
- **Full content concatenation**: `https://loisirs74.fr/llms-full.txt`
  (All 397 leisure sites in FR markdown format)

- **API index**: `https://loisirs74.fr/api/lieux.json`
  (Machine-readable index with slug, name, category, commune, GPS, URLs)

- **XML sitemap**: `https://loisirs74.fr/sitemap.xml`
  (Standard sitemap with lastmod, hreflang, image entries)

- **AI discovery manifest**: `https://loisirs74.fr/.well-known/ai-info.json`
  (All AI-related endpoints)

## Category Hubs (Markdown)
10 thematic collections accessible at `https://loisirs74.fr/content/{category}.md`:
lacs, cascades, bases-de-loisirs, points-de-vue, telecabines, chateaux, sentiers, voies-vertes, musees, attractions

content.text:
Done. Here's what I found.

## Machine-readable resources declared in `loisirs74.fr/llms.txt`

The site's `llms.txt` advertises the following resources for agents:

**Per-destination formats** (by `{slug}`):
- `https://loisirs74.fr/content/{slug}.md` — Markdown (French, canonical)
- `https://loisirs74.fr/content/en/{slug}.md` — Markdown (English)
- `https://loisirs74.fr/api/lieu/{slug}.json` — Typed JSON
- `https://loisirs74.fr/{slug}` and `/{lang}/{slug}` — HTML

**Discovery & indexing files:**
- `https://loisirs74.fr/llms-full.txt` — full content concatenation of all sites in FR markdown
- `https://loisirs74.fr/api/lieux.json` — machine-readable index (slug, name, category, commune, GPS, URLs)
- `https://loisirs74.fr/sitemap.xml` — XML sitemap with lastmod, hreflang, image entries
- `https://loisirs74.fr/.well-known/ai-info.json` — AI discovery manifest of all AI endpoints

**Category hubs (Markdown):** `https://loisirs74.fr/content/{category}.md` for 10 categories — lacs, cascades, bases-de-loisirs, points-de-vue, telecabines, chateaux, sentiers, voies-vertes, musees, attractions.

## One true fact extracted

I fetched the declared API index (`/api/lieux.json`). Its first entry:

> **Abbaye d'Aulps** (slug `abbaye-d-aulps`) is a *château*-category site located in the commune of **Saint-Jean-d'Aulps** (postal code 74430), at GPS coordinates **46.2419°N, 6.6498°E**.

(The index reports 392 entries total. I performed only read-only fetches — no forms or bookings.)

content.content:
# Beaches on Lac d'Annecy

Based on the page content, three beaches on Lac d'Annecy are listed:

1. **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** - "La seule grande plage de sable naturel du lac d'Annecy" with natural sand, shaded lawns, and diving platform
   - Link: https://loisirs74.fr/plage-de-saint-jorioz

2. **Plage d'Albigny** - Described as the largest public beach on the lake with 400 meters of grassy shoreline
   - Link: https://loisirs74.fr/plage-albigny

3. **Plage des Marquisats** - A 200-meter grassy beach on the western shore, monitored in summer, with accessibility features
   - Link: https://loisirs74.fr/plage-des-marquisats

## Navigation & Categories

The site organizes beaches under the **"Lacs & plages"** (Lakes & beaches) category. This section is part of the broader **"Nature & grand air"** (Nature & outdoor activities) grouping. Users can access all beaches via the "Voir tout" (View all) link at https://loisirs74.fr/lacs-plages/, which provides comprehensive beach listings beyond those featured on the homepage.

Links: [{"title":"Plage de Saint-Jorioz · Tarifs et horaires (74)","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/plage-de-saint-jorioz"},{"title":"Plages gratuites et payantes du lac d'Annecy","url":"https://www.annecy-ville.fr/plage-lac-annecy/"},{"title":"Où se baigner à Annecy : les meilleures plages du lac | Ryo","url":"https://ryo.co/fr/articles/france/annecy/meilleurs-endroits-se-baigner-annecy/"},{"title":"Se baigner au lac d'Annecy (liste des plages) - Tourisme Annecy","url":"https://www.tourisme-annecy.net/baignade-lac-annecy.html"},{"title":"Plages du lac d'Annecy : le guide complet | OVO Network","url":"https://www.ovonetwork.com/blog/fr/plages-du-lac-dannecy-le-guide-complet/"},{"title":"Plage de Doussard, horaires, tarifs et activités - Annecy","url":"https://www.annecy-ville.fr/plage-doussard/"},{"title":"Parc de l'Impérial · Annecy (74) | Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/parc-imperial-annecy"},{"title":"Lac d'Annecy : tour du lac, baignade, activités, camping, météo, en ce moment - Guide du lac d'Annecy - Tourisme","url":"https://www.linternaute.fr/sortir/guides-de-france/2592093-lac-d-annecy-tour-du-lac-baignade-activites-le-guide/"},{"title":"Sports nautiques au lac d'Annecy : activités famille | Annecy Camping Familial","url":"https://annecy-camping-familial.com/activites-plein-air/sports-nautiques-lac-annecy/"}]

Voici les informations trouvées concernant les plages surveillées du lac d'Annecy et leurs tarifs, notamment sur le site loisirs74.fr.

## Plage de Saint-Jorioz (source loisirs74.fr)

C'est la principale plage documentée en détail sur loisirs74.fr :

**Baignade et surveillance**
La plage de Saint-Jorioz est la seule grande plage de sable naturel du lac d'Annecy. Située sur la rive ouest du lac, face aux Dents de Lanfon et à la Tournette, elle s'étend sur environ 2 200 m² et combine plage de sable fin (env. 100 mètres de long) avec de vastes pelouses ombragées. La baignade est surveillée par des maîtres-nageurs de 9h30 à 17h30 en juillet-août.

**Horaires et accès**
La plage municipale est ouverte toute l'année : accès libre et gratuit de septembre à juin, accès payant et surveillé du 1er juillet au 31 août de 9h30 à 17h30. Du 1er juillet au 31 août, l'accès est payant de 9h30 à 17h30 (baignade surveillée MNS), avec une fermeture de 7h à 9h30 pour nettoyage.

**Tarifs d'entrée** (vérifiés sur le site officiel le 14 mai 2026)
Adulte (18 ans et +) : 2,60 € · Enfant 10–17 ans : 1 € · Moins de 10 ans : gratuit · Entrée après 16h30 : 1 € · Carte d'abonnement saison (accès illimité juil-août) : 22 € · Support carte à puce (frais de création) : 2 €. Hors saison (septembre-juin) : gratuit.

**Billetterie**
Billetterie en ligne sur saint-jorioz.fr (e-boutique) : achat de carte à puce, forfait 10/20 entrées, ou ticket à l'unité (QR code envoyé par mail).

**Équipements**
La plage est équipée d'un plongeoir à 3 niveaux (5 m de hauteur) accessible à la nage depuis les pontons, d'une pataugeoire et d'une aire de jeux pour les plus jeunes, d'un terrain de beach-volley et d'un terrain de pétanque. Un restaurant et un snack sont présents sur place. Labellisée Pavillon Bleu depuis 2010, la plage garantit une qualité environnementale élevée : nettoyage quotidien pendant la saison, renouvellement du sable tous les quatre ans, gestion des déchets et sensibilisation du public.

## Plage de l'Impérial à Annecy (source loisirs74.fr)

L'autre plage documentée sur loisirs74.fr est celle de l'Impérial, attenante au Parc de l'Impérial : c'est une plage municipale surveillée en été, avec accès payant en haute saison.

---

**Note complémentaire :** D'autres sources touristiques indiquent des tarifs comparables pour les plages payantes du lac. Par exemple, pour la plage de Menthon-Saint-Bernard, la plage est surveillée et payante durant l'été, au prix de 2,60 € pour les adultes et 1,20 € pour les moins de 16 ans (gratuit pour les moins de 4 ans).

Les tarifs pouvant varier selon les saisons, il est recommandé de vérifier directement sur les pages concernées de loisirs74.fr ou les sites municipaux officiels avant votre visite.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

Les tarifs pouvant varier selon les saisons, il est recommandé de vérifier directement sur les pages concernées de loisirs74.fr ou les sites municipaux officiels avant votre visite.

content.content:
# Plage de Saint-Jorioz: Pricing, Supervision & Children's Facilities

## Admission Prices

**Adults (18+):** €2.60 | **Children (10-17 years):** €1.00 | **Under 10:** Free

"Entrée après 16h30 : 1 €" (all ages). Season pass available at €22 for unlimited July-August access. Access is complimentary September through June.

## Lifeguard Supervision

Supervision operates exclusively during peak season: "de 9h30 à 17h30 en juillet-août" (9:30 AM to 5:30 PM, July-August). The beach closes from 7:00-9:30 AM for daily cleaning during this period. Outside these months, no supervised swimming.

## Children's Amenities

The beach provides dedicated facilities for young swimmers:
- **Shallow water area:** "pataugeoire" (paddling pool)
- **Play zone:** "aire de jeux pour les plus jeunes" (play area for younger children)
- **Sandy beach:** "pente douce, idéale pour les familles" (gentle slope, ideal for families)

Additional accessibility features include two amphibious wheelchairs (Tiralo and Hippocampe) available free during July-August, plus a water ramp for mobility-impaired visitors.

content.content:
# Parc de l'Impérial — Admission & Facilities

## Entry Prices
The park itself is **free**: "Gratuit · Accès libre" (free access). However, the adjacent Impérial Beach charges fees during summer season.

## Lifeguard Supervision
Supervised swimming occurs at the neighboring Impérial Beach: "baignade surveillée en saison" (supervised bathing in season). The park itself is not a swimming facility.

## Children's Facilities
The webpage mentions a "volière" (bird enclosure) described as "un point d'arrêt apprécié des enfants" (appreciated by children), but provides no details on dedicated shallow-water areas, playgrounds, or sandy beaches specifically within the park grounds.

**Note:** The site focuses on the garden's horticultural features (rose collection, flower beds, pathways) rather than detailed beach or water amenities. Contact the City of Annecy directly for complete information on children's water facilities at the adjacent beach.

content.content:
# Plage d'Albigny - Pricing & Facilities

## Admission Prices
**Free.** The page states: "Gratuit · Accès libre" (Free access). This is one of only two free public beaches in Annecy.

## Lifeguard Supervision
Supervised during summer months only: "Maîtres-nageurs sauveteurs en juillet–août, tous les jours de 11h à 19h" (Lifeguards present July-August, daily 11am-7pm). Outside this period, swimming is unsupervised.

## Child-Friendly Features

**Water Conditions:**
- "Fond sablonneux avec une pente douce facilitant l'accès à l'eau pour les jeunes enfants" (Sandy bottom with gentle slope for easy water access for young children)
- Adults can walk out to 100 meters depth

**Facilities:**
- Play areas for children present
- Ping-pong tables available
- Large grassy lawn for activities
- Free outdoor showers (two blocks with four showers each)
- Three free restroom blocks

**Note:** The beach is grassy rather than sandy, with shaded areas from trees and hedges.

content.text:
I now have solid data on two beaches from loisirs74.fr. Here's the comparison and recommendation.

## Comparing two beaches on Lac d'Annecy (source: loisirs74.fr)

| | **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** | **Plage d'Albigny** (Annecy) |
|---|---|---|
| **Entry price** | Paid in high season: Adult €2.60 · Child 10–17 €1 · **Under 10 free**. €1 after 16h30. Free Sept–June. | **Free / accès libre** year-round |
| **Lifeguard supervision** | Maîtres-nageurs, **July–August only, 9h30–17h30** | Maîtres-nageurs, **July–August only, 11h–19h** |
| **Beach surface** | Natural fine **sand** (~100 m), plus shaded lawns | Grass lawn (sandy *bottom* in the water) |
| **Entry into water** | Gentle slope, "idéale pour les familles" | Sandy bottom, gentle slope for easy access by young children |
| **Small-children facilities** | **Pataugeoire (paddling pool)** + dedicated play area for little ones | Children's play areas, but no dedicated paddling pool noted |
| **Extras** | Amphibious wheelchairs, snack/restaurant, Pavillon Bleu label | Free showers, free restrooms, ping-pong, shaded areas |

## Recommendation: **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** for a family with small children

Even though it charges an entry fee, it's the stronger choice for young kids, and the cost barely registers for a family:

1. **Better for toddlers' safety and play.** It has a dedicated **pataugeoire (paddling pool)** and a play area aimed at the youngest children — features Albigny lacks. A contained shallow area is ideal for small children who aren't strong swimmers.
2. **Real sand, gentle slope.** It's the only large natural sandy beach on the lake, explicitly described as "idéale pour les familles," so kids can play in sand and wade in gradually — easier and more comfortable than Albigny's grass-with-sandy-bottom setup.
3. **Longer morning supervision window.** Lifeguards start at **9h30** (vs. 11h at Albigny), which matters with small children who are usually out early rather than late.
4. **Negligible cost.** **Under-10s are free** and adults are only €2.60, so a family with small children pays very little — and it's free outside July–August anyway.

Albigny is the better pick only if a completely free visit or later-day supervision (until 19h) is the priority. But for the youngest children, Saint-Jorioz's paddling pool, sand, and earlier supervision make it the safer, more comfortable day out.

**Note:** I browsed and read pages only — no forms submitted or bookings made. Prices on loisirs74.fr were noted as verified 14 May 2026; confirm current tariffs before you go, as they can change seasonally.

Sources:
- [Plage de Saint-Jorioz · loisirs74.fr](https://loisirs74.fr/plage-de-saint-jorioz)
- [Plage d'Albigny · loisirs74.fr](https://loisirs74.fr/plage-albigny)
- [Parc de l'Impérial · loisirs74.fr](https://loisirs74.fr/parc-imperial-annecy)
- [loisirs74.fr — Lacs & plages](https://loisirs74.fr/lacs-plages/)

Voici les informations trouvées concernant les plages surveillées du lac d'Annecy et leurs tarifs, notamment sur le site loisirs74.fr.

## Plage de Saint-Jorioz (source loisirs74.fr)

C'est la principale plage documentée en détail sur loisirs74.fr :

**Baignade et surveillance**
La plage de Saint-Jorioz est la seule grande plage de sable naturel du lac d'Annecy. Située sur la rive ouest du lac, face aux Dents de Lanfon et à la Tournette, elle s'étend sur environ 2 200 m² et combine plage de sable fin (env. 100 mètres de long) avec de vastes pelouses ombragées. La baignade est surveillée par des maîtres-nageurs de 9h30 à 17h30 en juillet-août.

**Horaires et accès**

The beach provides dedicated facilities for young swimmers:
- **Shallow water area:** "pataugeoire" (paddling pool)

- **Sandy beach:** "pente douce, idéale pour les familles" (gentle slope, ideal for families)

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_015FEYaBCUZddkb4H9HziNiF","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"I now have solid data on two beaches from loisirs74.fr. Here's the comparison and recommendation.

## Comparing two beaches on Lac d'Annecy (source: loisirs74.fr)

| | **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** | **Plage d'Albigny** (Annecy) |
|---|---|---|
| **Entry price** | Paid in high season: Adult €2.60 · Child 10–17 €1 · **Under 10 free**. €1 after 16h30. Free Sept–June. | **Free / accès libre** year-round |
| **Lifeguard supervision** | Maîtres-nageurs, **July–August only, 9h30–17h30** | Maîtres-nageurs, **July–August only, 11h–19h** |
| **Beach surface** | Natural fine **sand** (~100 m), plus shaded lawns | Grass lawn (sandy *bottom* in the water) |
| **Entry into water** | Gentle slope, "idéale pour les familles" | Sandy bottom, gentle slope for easy access by young children |
| **Small-children facilities** | **Pataugeoire (paddling pool)** + dedicated play area for little ones | Children's play areas, but no dedicated paddling pool noted |
| **Extras** | Amphibious wheelchairs, snack/restaurant, Pavillon Bleu label | Free showers, free restrooms, ping-pong, shaded areas |

## Recommendation: **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** for a family with small children

Even though it charges an entry fee, it's the stronger choice for young kids, and the cost barely registers for a family:

1. **Better for toddlers' safety and play.** It has a dedicated **pataugeoire (paddling pool)** and a play area aimed at the youngest children — features Albigny lacks. A contained shallow area is ideal for small children who aren't strong swimmers.
2. **Real sand, gentle slope.** It's the only large natural sandy beach on the lake, explicitly described as "idéale pour les familles," so kids can play in sand and wade in gradually — easier and more comfortable than Albigny's grass-with-sandy-bottom setup.
3. **Longer morning supervision window.** Lifeguards start at **9h30** (vs. 11h at Albigny), which matters with small children who are usually out early rather than late.

entries.toolResultText:
# Beaches on Lac d'Annecy

Based on the page content, three beaches on Lac d'Annecy are listed:

1. **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** - "La seule grande plage de sable naturel du lac d'Annecy" with natural sand, shaded lawns, and diving platform
   - Link: https://loisirs74.fr/plage-de-saint-jorioz

2. **Plage d'Albigny** - Described as the largest public beach on the lake with 400 meters of grassy shoreline
   - Link: https://loisirs74.fr/plage-albigny

3. **Plage des Marquisats** - A 200-meter grassy beach on the western shore, monitored in summer, with accessibility features
   - Link: https://loisirs74.fr/plage-des-marquisats

## Navigation & Categories

The site organizes beaches under the **"Lacs & plages"** (Lakes & beaches) category. This section is part of the broader **"Nature & grand air"** (Nature & outdoor activities) grouping. Users can access all beaches via the "Voir tout" (View all) link at https://loisirs74.fr/lacs-plages/, which provides comprehensive beach listings beyond those featured on the homepage.

Web search results for query: "loisirs74.fr plage Lac d'Annecy baignade surveillée tarif entrée"

Links: [{"title":"Plage de Saint-Jorioz · Tarifs et horaires (74)","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/plage-de-saint-jorioz"},{"title":"Plages gratuites et payantes du lac d'Annecy","url":"https://www.annecy-ville.fr/plage-lac-annecy/"},{"title":"Où se baigner à Annecy : les meilleures plages du lac | Ryo","url":"https://ryo.co/fr/articles/france/annecy/meilleurs-endroits-se-baigner-annecy/"},{"title":"Se baigner au lac d'Annecy (liste des plages) - Tourisme Annecy","url":"https://www.tourisme-annecy.net/baignade-lac-annecy.html"},{"title":"Plages du lac d'Annecy : le guide complet | OVO Network","url":"https://www.ovonetwork.com/blog/fr/plages-du-lac-dannecy-le-guide-complet/"},{"title":"Plage de Doussard, horaires, tarifs et activités - Annecy","url":"https://www.annecy-ville.fr/plage-doussard/"},{"title":"Parc de l'Impérial · Annecy (74) | Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/parc-imperial-annecy"},{"title":"Lac d'Annecy : tour du lac, baignade, activités, camping, météo, en ce moment - Guide du lac d'Annecy - Tourisme","url":"https://www.linternaute.fr/sortir/guides-de-france/2592093-lac-d-annecy-tour-du-lac-baignade-activites-le-guide/"},{"title":"Sports nautiques au lac d'Annecy : activités famille | Annecy Camping Familial","url":"https://annecy-camping-familial.com/activites-plein-air/sports-nautiques-lac-annecy/"}]

Voici les informations trouvées concernant les plages surveillées du lac d'Annecy et leurs tarifs, notamment sur le site loisirs74.fr.

## Plage de Saint-Jorioz (source loisirs74.fr)

C'est la principale plage documentée en détail sur loisirs74.fr :

**Baignade et surveillance**
La plage de Saint-Jorioz est la seule grande plage de sable naturel du lac d'Annecy. Située sur la rive ouest du lac, face aux Dents de Lanfon et à la Tournette, elle s'étend sur environ 2 200 m² et combine plage de sable fin (env. 100 mètres de long) avec de vastes pelouses ombragées. La baignade est surveillée par des maîtres-nageurs de 9h30 à 17h30 en juillet-août.

**Horaires et accès**
La plage municipale est ouverte toute l'année : accès libre et gratuit de septembre à juin, accès payant et surveillé du 1er juillet au 31 août de 9h30 à 17h30. Du 1er juillet au 31 août, l'accès est payant de 9h30 à 17h30 (baignade surveillée MNS), avec une fermeture de 7h à 9h30 pour nettoyage.

**Tarifs d'entrée** (vérifiés sur le site officiel le 14 mai 2026)
Adulte (18 ans et +) : 2,60 € · Enfant 10–17 ans : 1 € · Moins de 10 ans : gratuit · Entrée après 16h30 : 1 € · Carte d'abonnement saison (accès illimité juil-août) : 22 € · Support carte à puce (frais de création) : 2 €. Hors saison (septembre-juin) : gratuit.

**Billetterie**
Billetterie en ligne sur saint-jorioz.fr (e-boutique) : achat de carte à puce, forfait 10/20 entrées, ou ticket à l'unité (QR code envoyé par mail).

**Équipements**
La plage est équipée d'un plongeoir à 3 niveaux (5 m de hauteur) accessible à la nage depuis les pontons, d'une pataugeoire et d'une aire de jeux pour les plus jeunes, d'un terrain de beach-volley et d'un terrain de pétanque. Un restaurant et un snack sont présents sur place. Labellisée Pavillon Bleu depuis 2010, la plage garantit une qualité environnementale élevée : nettoyage quotidien pendant la saison, renouvellement du sable tous les quatre ans, gestion des déchets et sensibilisation du public.

## Plage de l'Impérial à Annecy (source loisirs74.fr)

L'autre plage documentée sur loisirs74.fr est celle de l'Impérial, attenante au Parc de l'Impérial : c'est une plage municipale surveillée en été, avec accès payant en haute saison.

---

**Note complémentaire :** D'autres sources touristiques indiquent des tarifs comparables pour les plages payantes du lac. Par exemple, pour la plage de Menthon-Saint-Bernard, la plage est surveillée et payante durant l'été, au prix de 2,60 € pour les adultes et 1,20 € pour les moins de 16 ans (gratuit pour les moins de 4 ans).

Les tarifs pouvant varier selon les saisons, il est recommandé de vérifier directement sur les pages concernées de loisirs74.fr ou les sites municipaux officiels avant votre visite.

entries.toolResultText:
# Plage de Saint-Jorioz: Pricing, Supervision & Children's Facilities

## Admission Prices

**Adults (18+):** €2.60 | **Children (10-17 years):** €1.00 | **Under 10:** Free

"Entrée après 16h30 : 1 €" (all ages). Season pass available at €22 for unlimited July-August access. Access is complimentary September through June.

## Lifeguard Supervision

Supervision operates exclusively during peak season: "de 9h30 à 17h30 en juillet-août" (9:30 AM to 5:30 PM, July-August). The beach closes from 7:00-9:30 AM for daily cleaning during this period. Outside these months, no supervised swimming.

## Children's Amenities

The beach provides dedicated facilities for young swimmers:
- **Shallow water area:** "pataugeoire" (paddling pool)
- **Play zone:** "aire de jeux pour les plus jeunes" (play area for younger children)
- **Sandy beach:** "pente douce, idéale pour les familles" (gentle slope, ideal for families)

Additional accessibility features include two amphibious wheelchairs (Tiralo and Hippocampe) available free during July-August, plus a water ramp for mobility-impaired visitors.

# Parc de l'Impérial — Admission & Facilities

## Entry Prices
The park itself is **free**: "Gratuit · Accès libre" (free access). However, the adjacent Impérial Beach charges fees during summer season.

## Lifeguard Supervision
Supervised swimming occurs at the neighboring Impérial Beach: "baignade surveillée en saison" (supervised bathing in season). The park itself is not a swimming facility.

## Children's Facilities
The webpage mentions a "volière" (bird enclosure) described as "un point d'arrêt apprécié des enfants" (appreciated by children), but provides no details on dedicated shallow-water areas, playgrounds, or sandy beaches specifically within the park grounds.

**Note:** The site focuses on the garden's horticultural features (rose collection, flower beds, pathways) rather than detailed beach or water amenities. Contact the City of Annecy directly for complete information on children's water facilities at the adjacent beach.

entries.toolResultText:
# Plage d'Albigny - Pricing & Facilities

## Admission Prices
**Free.** The page states: "Gratuit · Accès libre" (Free access). This is one of only two free public beaches in Annecy.

## Lifeguard Supervision
Supervised during summer months only: "Maîtres-nageurs sauveteurs en juillet–août, tous les jours de 11h à 19h" (Lifeguards present July-August, daily 11am-7pm). Outside this period, swimming is unsupervised.

## Child-Friendly Features

**Water Conditions:**
- "Fond sablonneux avec une pente douce facilitant l'accès à l'eau pour les jeunes enfants" (Sandy bottom with gentle slope for easy water access for young children)
- Adults can walk out to 100 meters depth

**Facilities:**
- Play areas for children present
- Ping-pong tables available
- Large grassy lawn for activities
- Free outdoor showers (two blocks with four showers each)
- Three free restroom blocks

**Note:** The beach is grassy rather than sandy, with shaded areas from trees and hedges.

entries.text:
I now have solid data on two beaches from loisirs74.fr. Here's the comparison and recommendation.

## Comparing two beaches on Lac d'Annecy (source: loisirs74.fr)

| | **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** | **Plage d'Albigny** (Annecy) |
|---|---|---|
| **Entry price** | Paid in high season: Adult €2.60 · Child 10–17 €1 · **Under 10 free**. €1 after 16h30. Free Sept–June. | **Free / accès libre** year-round |
| **Lifeguard supervision** | Maîtres-nageurs, **July–August only, 9h30–17h30** | Maîtres-nageurs, **July–August only, 11h–19h** |
| **Beach surface** | Natural fine **sand** (~100 m), plus shaded lawns | Grass lawn (sandy *bottom* in the water) |
| **Entry into water** | Gentle slope, "idéale pour les familles" | Sandy bottom, gentle slope for easy access by young children |
| **Small-children facilities** | **Pataugeoire (paddling pool)** + dedicated play area for little ones | Children's play areas, but no dedicated paddling pool noted |
| **Extras** | Amphibious wheelchairs, snack/restaurant, Pavillon Bleu label | Free showers, free restrooms, ping-pong, shaded areas |

## Recommendation: **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** for a family with small children

Even though it charges an entry fee, it's the stronger choice for young kids, and the cost barely registers for a family:

1. **Better for toddlers' safety and play.** It has a dedicated **pataugeoire (paddling pool)** and a play area aimed at the youngest children — features Albigny lacks. A contained shallow area is ideal for small children who aren't strong swimmers.
2. **Real sand, gentle slope.** It's the only large natural sandy beach on the lake, explicitly described as "idéale pour les familles," so kids can play in sand and wade in gradually — easier and more comfortable than Albigny's grass-with-sandy-bottom setup.
3. **Longer morning supervision window.** Lifeguards start at **9h30** (vs. 11h at Albigny), which matters with small children who are usually out early rather than late.
4. **Negligible cost.** **Under-10s are free** and adults are only €2.60, so a family with small children pays very little — and it's free outside July–August anyway.

Albigny is the better pick only if a completely free visit or later-day supervision (until 19h) is the priority. But for the youngest children, Saint-Jorioz's paddling pool, sand, and earlier supervision make it the safer, more comfortable day out.

**Note:** I browsed and read pages only — no forms submitted or bookings made. Prices on loisirs74.fr were noted as verified 14 May 2026; confirm current tariffs before you go, as they can change seasonally.

Sources:
- [Plage de Saint-Jorioz · loisirs74.fr](https://loisirs74.fr/plage-de-saint-jorioz)
- [Plage d'Albigny · loisirs74.fr](https://loisirs74.fr/plage-albigny)
- [Parc de l'Impérial · loisirs74.fr](https://loisirs74.fr/parc-imperial-annecy)
- [loisirs74.fr — Lacs & plages](https://loisirs74.fr/lacs-plages/)

  Result: # Plage de Saint-Jorioz: Pricing, Supervision & Children's Facilities

## Admission Prices

**Adults (18+):** €2.60 | **Children (10-17 years):** €1.00 | **Under 10:** Free

"Entrée après 16h30 : 1 €" (all ages). Season pass available at €22 for unlimited July-August access. Access is complimentary September through June.

## Lifeguard Supervision

Supervision operates exclusively during peak season: "de 9h30 à 17h30 en juillet-août" (9:30 AM to 5:30 PM, July-August). The beach closes from 7:00-9:30 AM for daily cleaning during this period. Outside these months, no supervised swimming.

## Children's Amenities

The beach provides dedicated facilities for young swimmers:
- **Shallow water area:** "pataugeoire" (paddling pool)
- **Play zone:** "aire de jeux pour les plus jeunes" (play area for younger children)
- **Sandy beach:** "pente douce, idéale pour les familles" (gentle slope, ideal for families)

Additional accessibility features include two amphibious wheelchairs (Tiralo and Hippocampe) available free during July-August, plus a water ramp for mobility-impaired visitors.

## Admission Prices
**Free.** The page states: "Gratuit · Accès libre" (Free access). This is one of only two free public beaches in Annecy.

## Lifeguard Supervision
Supervised during summer months only: "Maîtres-nageurs sauveteurs en juillet–août, tous les jours de 11h à 19h" (Lifeguards present July-August, daily 11am-7pm). Outside this period, swimming is unsupervised.

## Child-Friendly Features

- Ping-pong tables available
- Large grassy lawn for activities
- Free outdoor showers (two blocks with four showers each)
- Three free restroom blocks

**Note:** The beach is grassy rather than sandy, with shaded areas from trees and hedges.

## Comparing two beaches on Lac d'Annecy (source: loisirs74.fr)

| | **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** | **Plage d'Albigny** (Annecy) |
|---|---|---|
| **Entry price** | Paid in high season: Adult €2.60 · Child 10–17 €1 · **Under 10 free**. €1 after 16h30. Free Sept–June. | **Free / accès libre** year-round |
| **Lifeguard supervision** | Maîtres-nageurs, **July–August only, 9h30–17h30** | Maîtres-nageurs, **July–August only, 11h–19h** |
| **Beach surface** | Natural fine **sand** (~100 m), plus shaded lawns | Grass lawn (sandy *bottom* in the water) |
| **Entry into water** | Gentle slope, "idéale pour les familles" | Sandy bottom, gentle slope for easy access by young children |
| **Small-children facilities** | **Pataugeoire (paddling pool)** + dedicated play area for little ones | Children's play areas, but no dedicated paddling pool noted |
| **Extras** | Amphibious wheelchairs, snack/restaurant, Pavillon Bleu label | Free showers, free restrooms, ping-pong, shaded areas |

## Recommendation: **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** for a family with small children

Even though it charges an entry fee, it's the stronger choice for young kids, and the cost barely registers for a family:

1. **Better for toddlers' safety and play.** It has a dedicated **pataugeoire (paddling pool)** and a play area aimed at the youngest children — features Albigny lacks. A contained shallow area is ideal for small children who aren't strong swimmers.
2. **Real sand, gentle slope.** It's the only large natural sandy beach on the lake, explicitly described as "idéale pour les familles," so kids can play in sand and wade in gradually — easier and more comfortable than Albigny's grass-with-sandy-bottom setup.
3. **Longer morning supervision window.** Lifeguards start at **9h30** (vs. 11h at Albigny), which matters with small children who are usually out early rather than late
... (truncated)

Here's what I found about the **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** from the loisirs74.fr page and other sources:

## Overview
The Plage de Saint-Jorioz is a large sandy beach on the shore of Lake Annecy facing the Dents de Lanfon. It's the only beach around Lake Annecy to offer a large sandy beach. It holds the "Blue Flag" label since 2010 and is also labeled Tourism & Handicap for accessibility.

## Opening Hours & Access
According to loisirs74.fr:
- January 1 – June 30: free access every day.
- July 1 – August 31: paid access from 9:30 am to 5:30 pm (supervised swimming by lifeguards). Closed 7 am–9:30 am for cleaning.
- September 1 – December 31: free access every day.

## Pricing (July–August only)
Adult (18+): €2.60. Child 10–17 years: €1. Under 10: free. Entry after 4:30 pm: €1 (all ages). Season pass (unlimited access July–Aug): €22. There is also a smart card support (creation fee): €2. Access is free from September to June.

## Tickets
The beach does not require reservation. You buy your entry ticket on-site at the cash desks (July–August), or online via the ticketing system on saint-jorioz.fr (smart card, package, or single ticket). Outside July–August, access is free.

## Facilities & Activities
The beach is well-equipped with a diving board, shaded lawns, children's play area/paddling pool, beach volleyball court, and pétanque. It also has a restaurant and snack bar, plus a natural sandy area, showers, and free parking. Nearby you can rent pedalos, paddles, catamarans, and enjoy water-skiing, wakeboarding, and surfing.

For visitors with reduced mobility: the beach is equipped with an access ramp into the water and two amphibious wheelchairs (tiralo + hippocampe chairs) provided free of charge during July and August.

## Getting There
From Annecy (9 km, about 15 min off-season), follow the west shore of Lake Annecy via the D909a toward Duingt/Faverges. In Saint-Jorioz, turn left at the light toward the beach (signposted). Large free parking in front of the beach entrance. Note: there are frequent traffic jams in summer at the end of the day returning to Annecy. Alternatives include the SIBRA bus line 15 from Annecy, seasonal nautical shuttles and cruise boats from Annecy, and the Lake Annecy cycle path.

## Good to Know
- Entry is prohibited for children under 10 unaccompanied by an adult. Dogs are prohibited within the beach enclosure all year, even on a leash.
- However, dogs are accepted on the small beach to the left of the Plage de Saint-Jorioz — one of the few beaches at Annecy where you can bring your dog (during the season).

**Note:** The information on loisirs74.fr was verified on the official site on May 14, 2026 — subject to seasonal changes.

# Plage de Saint-Jorioz: Key Information

**Admission Price (Tarif):**
"Adulte (18 ans et +) : 2,60 € · Enfant 10–17 ans : 1 € · Moins de 10 ans : gratuit"
Outside summer months (September-June), access is complimentary.

**Opening Hours (Horaires):**
The beach operates year-round with seasonal variations. It's freely accessible January 30-June and September 31-December. From July 1-August 31, paid entry is available from 9:30 AM to 5:30 PM, with a 7:00-9:30 AM closure for cleaning.

**Wheelchair Accessibility (Accessibilité PMR):**
"Rampe d'accès à l'eau, tapis avec main courante et deux fauteuils amphibies (tiralo + hippocampe) gratuits en juillet-août ; entrée de plain-pied, WC adaptés, place PMR."
The facility holds the "Tourisme et Handicap" certification, indicating comprehensive disability accommodations including water access ramps and complimentary amphibious wheelchairs during peak season.

Here's what I found about the **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** from the loisirs74.fr page and other sources:

## Overview
The Plage de Saint-Jorioz is a large sandy beach on the shore of Lake Annecy facing the Dents de Lanfon. It's the only beach around Lake Annecy to offer a large sandy beach. It holds the "Blue Flag" label since 2010 and is also labeled Tourism & Handicap for accessibility.

## Opening Hours & Access
According to loisirs74.fr:
- January 1 – June 30: free access every day.
- July 1 – August 31: paid access from 9:30 am to 5:30 pm (supervised swimming by lifeguards). Closed 7 am–9:30 am for cleaning.
- September 1 – December 31: free access every day.

## Pricing (July–August only)
Adult (18+): €2.60. Child 10–17 years: €1. Under 10: free. Entry after 4:30 pm: €1 (all ages). Season pass (unlimited access July–Aug): €22. There is also a smart card support (creation fee): €2. Access is free from September to June.

## Tickets
The beach does not require reservation. You buy your entry ticket on-site at the cash desks (July–August), or online via the ticketing system on saint-jorioz.fr (smart card, package, or single ticket). Outside July–August, access is free.

## Facilities & Activities
The beach is well-equipped with a diving board, shaded lawns, children's play area/paddling pool, beach volleyball court, and pétanque. It also has a restaurant and snack bar, plus a natural sandy area, showers, and free parking. Nearby you can rent pedalos, paddles, catamarans, and enjoy water-skiing, wakeboarding, and surfing.

For visitors with reduced mobility: the beach is equipped with an access ramp into the water and two amphibious wheelchairs (tiralo + hippocampe chairs) provided free of charge during July and August.

## Getting There
From Annecy (9 km, about 15 min off-season), follow the west shore of Lake Annecy via the D909a toward Duingt/Faverges. In Saint-Jorioz, turn left at the light toward the beach (signposted). Large free parking in front of the beach entrance. Note: there are frequent traffic jams in summer at the end of the day returning to Annecy. Alternatives include the SIBRA bus line 15 from Annecy, seasonal nautical shuttles and cruise boats from Annecy, and the Lake Annecy cycle path.

## Good to Know
- Entry is prohibited for children under 10 unaccompanied by an adult. Dogs are prohibited within the beach enclosure all year, even on a leash.
- However, dogs are accepted on the small beach to the left of the Plage de Saint-Jorioz — one of the few beaches at Annecy where you can bring your dog (during the season).

**Note:** The information on loisirs74.fr was verified on the official site on May 14, 2026 — subject to seasonal changes.

Here's what I found about the **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** from the loisirs74.fr page and other sources:

## Overview
The Plage de Saint-Jorioz is a large sandy beach on the shore of Lake Annecy facing the Dents de Lanfon. It's the only beach around Lake Annecy to offer a large sandy beach. It holds the "Blue Flag" label since 2010 and is also labeled Tourism & Handicap for accessibility.

## Opening Hours & Access
According to loisirs74.fr:
- January 1 – June 30: free access every day.
- July 1 – August 31: paid access from 9:30 am to 5:30 pm (supervised swimming by lifeguards). Closed 7 am–9:30 am for cleaning.
- September 1 – December 31: free access every day.

## Pricing (July–August only)
Adult (18+): €2.60. Child 10–17 years: €1. Under 10: free. Entry after 4:30 pm: €1 (all ages). Season pass (unlimited access July–Aug): €22. There is also a smart card support (creation fee): €2. Access is free from September to June.

## Tickets
The beach does not require reservation. You buy your entry ticket on-site at the cash desks (July–August), or online via the ticketing system on saint-jorioz.fr (smart card, package, or single ticket). Outside July–August, access is free.

## Facilities & Activities
The beach is well-equipped with a diving board, shaded lawns, children's play area/paddling pool, beach volleyball court, and pétanque. It also has a restaurant and snack bar, plus a natural sandy area, showers, and free parking. Nearby you can rent pedalos, paddles, catamarans, and enjoy water-skiing, wakeboarding, and surfing.

For visitors with reduced mobility: the beach is equipped with an access ramp into the water and two amphibious wheelchairs (tiralo + hippocampe chairs) provided free of charge during July and August.

## Getting There
From Annecy (9 km, about 15 min off-season), follow the west shore of Lake Annecy via the D909a toward Duingt/Faverges. In Saint-Jorioz, turn left at the light toward the beach (signposted). Large free parking in front of the beach entrance. Note: there are frequent traffic jams in summer at the end of the day returning to Annecy. Alternatives include the SIBRA bus line 15 from Annecy, seasonal nautical shuttles and cruise boats from Annecy, and the Lake Annecy cycle path.

## Good to Know
- Entry is prohibited for children under 10 unaccompanied by an adult. Dogs are prohibited within the beach enclosure all year, even on a leash.
- However, dogs are accepted on the small beach to the left of the Plage de Saint-Jorioz — one of the few beaches at Annecy where you can bring your dog (during the season).

**Note:** The information on loisirs74.fr was verified on the official site on May 14, 2026 — subject to seasonal changes.

entries.toolResultText:
# Plage de Saint-Jorioz: Key Information

**Admission Price (Tarif):**
"Adulte (18 ans et +) : 2,60 € · Enfant 10–17 ans : 1 € · Moins de 10 ans : gratuit"
Outside summer months (September-June), access is complimentary.

**Opening Hours (Horaires):**
The beach operates year-round with seasonal variations. It's freely accessible January 30-June and September 31-December. From July 1-August 31, paid entry is available from 9:30 AM to 5:30 PM, with a 7:00-9:30 AM closure for cleaning.

**Wheelchair Accessibility (Accessibilité PMR):**
"Rampe d'accès à l'eau, tapis avec main courante et deux fauteuils amphibies (tiralo + hippocampe) gratuits en juillet-août ; entrée de plain-pied, WC adaptés, place PMR."
The facility holds the "Tourisme et Handicap" certification, indicating comprehensive disability accommodations including water access ramps and complimentary amphibious wheelchairs during peak season.

entries.text:

- **Opening hours:** Open year-round. Free access January–June and September–December. In July–August, paid entry from **9:30 AM to 5:30 PM**, with a closure from 7:00–9:30 AM for cleaning.
- **Wheelchair accessibility:** Accessible — water-access ramp, matting with handrail, and two free amphibious wheelchairs (tiralo + hippocampe) in July–August; step-free entrance, adapted WC, and PMR parking space. Holds the "Tourisme et Handicap" label.

# Plage de Saint-Jorioz Information

**Location:** Saint-Jorioz (commune in Haute-Savoie)

**Entrance Fee:** The beach features variable pricing - it is "Placený vstup v červenci a srpnu (2,60 €), zbytek roku zdarma" (paid entry July-August at €2.60, free rest of year).

**Direct Link:** https://loisirs74.fr/cs/plage-de-saint-jorioz

**Description:** This is a large natural sandy beach on Lac d'Annecy with views of Dents de Lanfon, awarded Blue Flag status.

input.prompt: List the main categories and navigation links on this page, especially anything about indoor activities, family activities, or venues near Annecy. Include the URLs of relevant links.

content.content:
# Main Categories and Navigation Links

## Primary Categories

The site organizes leisure activities into three main sections:

1. **Nature & Grand Air** - "Lacs, plages et bases de loisirs, cascades, panoramas et sentiers"
   - [Lacs & plages](https://loisirs74.fr/lacs-plages/)
   - [Cascades & gorges](https://loisirs74.fr/cascades/)
   - [Sentiers & randonnées](https://loisirs74.fr/sentiers/)
   - [Voies vertes & vélo](https://loisirs74.fr/voies-vertes/)

2. **Patrimoine & Culture**
   - [Châteaux, forts & abbayes](https://loisirs74.fr/chateaux/)
   - [Musées](https://loisirs74.fr/musees/)

3. **Sport, Jeux & Sensations**
   - [Baignade & nautisme](https://loisirs74.fr/baignade-nautisme/)
   - [Sensations & plein air](https://loisirs74.fr/sensations-plein-air/)
   - [Sport & jeux](https://loisirs74.fr/sport-jeux/)
   - [Parcs, jardins & familles](https://loisirs74.fr/parcs-jardins/)
   - [Sorties & détente](https://loisirs74.fr/sorties-detente/)

## Indoor & Family Activities Near Annecy

**Annecy-based venues:**
- [Le Bowl Bowling Annecy](https://loisirs74.fr/bowling-le-bowl-annecy) - "16 pistes + restaurant + nightclub"
- [Patinoire Jean Régis](https://loisirs74.fr/patinoire-jean-regis-annecy)
- [Atome Climbing](https://loisirs74.fr/escalade-atome-annecy)
- [Casino Impérial Palace](https://loisirs74.fr/casino-imperial-palace-annecy)
- [Pathé Annecy](https://loisirs74.fr/cinema-pathe-annecy) - cinema multiplexe

content.content:
# Le Bowl Bowling Annecy

**Venue Name:** Le Bowl Bowling Annecy

**Location/Address:** 9 boulevard du Fier, 74000 Annecy, France

**Activity:** A bowling complex featuring "16 PISTES + RESTAURANT + NIGHTCLUB" offering a complete evening entertainment experience combining bowling, dining, and nightlife in one location.

**Pricing Details:**
- Adult: €8 per game
- Child: €6 per game
- Family package rates available for evening sessions
- Average game duration: 30-45 minutes
- Special birthday party packages available (1 hour + beverages)

**Operating Hours:**
- Monday-Thursday: 2 PM–1 AM
- Friday-Saturday: 2 PM–4 AM
- Sunday: 2 PM–Midnight

**Family Suitability:** Yes, the venue is suitable for families with children. It offers birthday party packages specifically for kids and has wheelchair accessibility on the ground floor. The bowling area is family-friendly, though the nightclub section (open Friday-Saturday, 11 PM–4 AM) would be geared toward adult evening entertainment. Parking is complimentary on-site.

content.content:
# Patinoire Jean Régis - Venue Information

**Venue Name:** Patinoire Jean Régis

**Location:** 27 rue du Stade, 74000 Annecy, France (near Parc des Sports)

**Activity:** Indoor ice skating rink (58 × 28 meters) offering "séances publiques, soirée disco du vendredi, cours de patinage artistique et hockey"

**Pricing Details:**
- Adult entry: €4.60
- Skate rental: €3.40
- Children: €3.00
- Seasonal passes available
- Session duration: 2 hours

**Operating Hours:**
- Wednesday, Saturday, Sunday: 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM
- Friday: 8:00 PM - 11:00 PM (disco night)
- Daily during school holidays
- Open year-round

**Family Suitability:** Yes. The facility is "partiellement accessible" for persons with mobility needs, offers wheelchair/stroller access, and features beginner courses. Friday disco nights are popular with teenagers and tourists. No animals permitted indoors.

**Reservations:** Available through annecy-ville.fr or +33 (0)4 50 51 33 21 (recommended during peak season)

**Venue Name:** Atome Climbing Annecy (also called Atome Annecy)

**Location:** Annecy, 74000, Haute-Savoie, France (exact address to be confirmed on official site)

**Activity:** Indoor climbing facility featuring "mur de voies hautes" (high wall routes, 15m+) for lead or top-rope climbing, and a large bouldering area (4-5m height) without ropes on thick mats.

**Pricing:**
- Entry: approximately €15-20 full price
- Student/child discounts available
- Equipment rental packages (climbing shoes + harness)
- Subscriptions: 10-entry pass, monthly, or annual plans at reduced rates
- Exact 2026 prices need confirmation

**Hours:** Open year-round with extended evening hours (~22h weekdays), broader weekend availability

**Family-Friendly?** Yes. The facility "accueille grimpeurs débutants comme confirmés, familles avec enfants" (welcomes beginner and experienced climbers, families with children). Children can participate from ages 6-8 depending on areas, with supervision or guided courses. Baby climbing classes sometimes offered.

content.content:
# Pathé Annecy Cinema

**Venue Name:** Pathé Annecy

**Location:** Annecy, 74000 Haute-Savoie, France (center of town, near Bonlieu)

**Activity:** A modern multiplex cinema with approximately 8 screens offering "projection numérique laser" and immersive sound, showing weekly-updated programming including blockbusters, art films, and special events.

**Pricing Details:**
- Full price: €9-12
- Reduced rate: €6-8 (students, under 14/18, unemployed)
- Morning matinee screenings available at lower rates
- Pass Culture accepted (ages 15-20)
- Subscription booklets: 5 or 10-ticket carnets available

**Family Suitability:** Yes. The venue offers "films jeune public" (youth programming), regular children's screenings on Wednesdays and weekends, and features dedicated amenities including concessions and accessible facilities. The cinema participates in school-focused initiatives like "École et cinéma."

**Accessibility:** Wheelchair-accessible with dedicated seating, adapted restrooms, magnetic induction loops, and nearby adapted parking.

content.text:
I have what I need. Here's a rainy-afternoon plan built entirely from loisirs74.fr listings (browsed read-only, no bookings made).

## Rainy afternoon in Annecy — 3 indoor family venues

All three are inside the city (74000 Annecy), close together, so you can pick one as the main event or chain two of them.

### 1. Patinoire Jean Régis — indoor ice skating 🛼
- **Address:** 27 rue du Stade, 74000 Annecy (near Parc des Sports)
- **Why:** Big indoor rink with public sessions and beginner-friendly access; strollers/wheelchairs OK.
- **Prices:** Adult **€4.60**, child **€3.00**, skate rental **€3.40**. Sessions run ~2 hrs.
- **Afternoon hours:** Wed/Sat/Sun 2:00–6:00 PM (daily during school holidays).
- **Family cost estimate** (2 adults + 2 kids, all renting skates): ~€28.90.

### 2. Le Bowl — bowling 🎳
- **Address:** 9 boulevard du Fier, 74000 Annecy (free on-site parking)
- **Why:** 16 lanes + restaurant; ground floor is wheelchair-accessible and kid-friendly. (The nightclub only opens late Fri/Sat, so afternoons are firmly family time.)
- **Prices:** Adult **€8/game**, child **€6/game** (~30–45 min per game).
- **Afternoon hours:** Opens 2:00 PM daily.
- **Family cost estimate** (2 adults + 2 kids, one game each): ~€28.

### 3. Pathé Annecy — cinema 🎬
- **Location:** Town centre, near Bonlieu; laser digital projection, ~8 screens.
- **Why:** Reliable rainy-day fallback with *films jeune public* and regular kids' screenings on Wednesdays and weekends.
- **Prices:** Full **€9–12**, reduced **€6–8** (under-14/18, students). Morning matinees cheaper.
- **Family cost estimate** (2 adults + 2 kids): roughly €30–40 depending on the session.

### Suggested plan
Start with **skating at Patinoire Jean Régis** (2–4 PM), then a short hop to **Le Bowl** for a couple of games, or wind down at **Pathé** for an afternoon kids' screening. All-indoor, so the rain never matters.

**A note on prices:** The figures above are the indicative rates published on loisirs74.fr. Bowling and skating prices are listed concretely; the cinema is given as a range, and I'd treat those as guidance rather than a guaranteed quote — worth confirming on each venue's official page before you go.

One more option from the site if you want a fourth idea: **Atome Climbing** (indoor climbing, welcomes families with kids ~6+), but loisirs74.fr only lists an approximate €15–20 entry and flags that 2026 prices need confirmation — so I left it out of the firm quotes above.

## Rainy afternoon in Annecy — 3 indoor family venues

All three are inside the city (74000 Annecy), close together, so you can pick one as the main event or chain two of them.

### 1. Patinoire Jean Régis — indoor ice skating 🛼
- **Address:** 27 rue du Stade, 74000 Annecy (near Parc des Sports)
- **Why:** Big indoor rink with public sessions and beginner-friendly access; strollers/wheelchairs OK.
- **Prices:** Adult **€4.60**, child **€3.00**, skate rental **€3.40**. Sessions run ~2 hrs.
- **Afternoon hours:** Wed/Sat/Sun 2:00–6:00 PM (daily during school holidays).
- **Family cost estimate** (2 adults + 2 kids, all renting skates): ~€28.90.

### 2. Le Bowl — bowling 🎳
- **Address:** 9 boulevard du Fier, 74000 Annecy (free on-site parking)
- **Why:** 16 lanes + restaurant; ground floor is wheelchair-accessible and kid-friendly. (The nightclub only opens late Fri/Sat, so afternoons are firmly family time.)
- **Prices:** Adult **€8/game**, child **€6/game** (~30–45 min per game).
- **Afternoon hours:** Opens 2:00 PM daily.
- **Family cost estimate** (2 adults + 2 kids, one game each): ~€28.

### 3. Pathé Annecy — cinema 🎬
- **Location:** Town centre, near Bonlieu; laser digital projection, ~8 screens.
- **Why:** Reliable rainy-day fallback with *films jeune public* and regular kids' screenings on Wednesdays and weekends.
- **Prices:** Full **€9–12**, reduced **€6–8** (under-14/18, students). Morning matinees cheaper.
- **Family cost estimate** (2 adults + 2 kids): roughly €30–40 depending on the session.

### Suggested plan
Start with **skating at Patinoire Jean Régis** (2–4 PM), then a short hop to **Le Bowl** for a couple of games, or wind down at **Pathé** for an afternoon kids' screening. All-indoor, so the rain never matters.

**A note on prices:** The figures above are the indicative rates published on loisirs74.fr. Bowling and skating prices are listed concretely; the cinema is given as a range, and I'd treat those as guidance rather than a guaranteed quote — worth confirming on each venue's official page before you go.

entries.toolResultText:
# Le Bowl Bowling Annecy

**Venue Name:** Le Bowl Bowling Annecy

**Location/Address:** 9 boulevard du Fier, 74000 Annecy, France

**Activity:** A bowling complex featuring "16 PISTES + RESTAURANT + NIGHTCLUB" offering a complete evening entertainment experience combining bowling, dining, and nightlife in one location.

**Pricing Details:**
- Adult: €8 per game
- Child: €6 per game
- Family package rates available for evening sessions
- Average game duration: 30-45 minutes
- Special birthday party packages available (1 hour + beverages)

**Operating Hours:**
- Monday-Thursday: 2 PM–1 AM
- Friday-Saturday: 2 PM–4 AM
- Sunday: 2 PM–Midnight

**Family Suitability:** Yes, the venue is suitable for families with children. It offers birthday party packages specifically for kids and has wheelchair accessibility on the ground floor. The bowling area is family-friendly, though the nightclub section (open Friday-Saturday, 11 PM–4 AM) would be geared toward adult evening entertainment. Parking is complimentary on-site.

# Patinoire Jean Régis - Venue Information

**Venue Name:** Patinoire Jean Régis

**Location:** 27 rue du Stade, 74000 Annecy, France (near Parc des Sports)

**Activity:** Indoor ice skating rink (58 × 28 meters) offering "séances publiques, soirée disco du vendredi, cours de patinage artistique et hockey"

**Pricing Details:**
- Adult entry: €4.60
- Skate rental: €3.40
- Children: €3.00
- Seasonal passes available
- Session duration: 2 hours

**Operating Hours:**
- Wednesday, Saturday, Sunday: 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM
- Friday: 8:00 PM - 11:00 PM (disco night)
- Daily during school holidays
- Open year-round

**Family Suitability:** Yes. The facility is "partiellement accessible" for persons with mobility needs, offers wheelchair/stroller access, and features beginner courses. Friday disco nights are popular with teenagers and tourists. No animals permitted indoors.

**Reservations:** Available through annecy-ville.fr or +33 (0)4 50 51 33 21 (recommended during peak season)

# Atome Climbing Annecy

**Venue Name:** Atome Climbing Annecy (also called Atome Annecy)

**Location:** Annecy, 74000, Haute-Savoie, France (exact address to be confirmed on official site)

**Activity:** Indoor climbing facility featuring "mur de voies hautes" (high wall routes, 15m+) for lead or top-rope climbing, and a large bouldering area (4-5m height) without ropes on thick mats.

**Pricing:**
- Entry: approximately €15-20 full price
- Student/child discounts available
- Equipment rental packages (climbing shoes + harness)
- Subscriptions: 10-entry pass, monthly, or annual plans at reduced rates
- Exact 2026 prices need confirmation

**Hours:** Open year-round with extended evening hours (~22h weekdays), broader weekend availability

**Family-Friendly?** Yes. The facility "accueille grimpeurs débutants comme confirmés, familles avec enfants" (welcomes beginner and experienced climbers, families with children). Children can participate from ages 6-8 depending on areas, with supervision or guided courses. Baby climbing classes sometimes offered.

# Pathé Annecy Cinema

**Venue Name:** Pathé Annecy

**Location:** Annecy, 74000 Haute-Savoie, France (center of town, near Bonlieu)

**Activity:** A modern multiplex cinema with approximately 8 screens offering "projection numérique laser" and immersive sound, showing weekly-updated programming including blockbusters, art films, and special events.

**Pricing Details:**
- Full price: €9-12
- Reduced rate: €6-8 (students, under 14/18, unemployed)
- Morning matinee screenings available at lower rates
- Pass Culture accepted (ages 15-20)
- Subscription booklets: 5 or 10-ticket carnets available

**Family Suitability:** Yes. The venue offers "films jeune public" (youth programming), regular children's screenings on Wednesdays and weekends, and features dedicated amenities including concessions and accessible facilities. The cinema participates in school-focused initiatives like "École et cinéma."

**Accessibility:** Wheelchair-accessible with dedicated seating, adapted restrooms, magnetic induction loops, and nearby adapted parking.

entries.text:
I have what I need. Here's a rainy-afternoon plan built entirely from loisirs74.fr listings (browsed read-only, no bookings made).

## Rainy afternoon in Annecy — 3 indoor family venues

All three are inside the city (74000 Annecy), close together, so you can pick one as the main event or chain two of them.

### 1. Patinoire Jean Régis — indoor ice skating 🛼
- **Address:** 27 rue du Stade, 74000 Annecy (near Parc des Sports)
- **Why:** Big indoor rink with public sessions and beginner-friendly access; strollers/wheelchairs OK.
- **Prices:** Adult **€4.60**, child **€3.00**, skate rental **€3.40**. Sessions run ~2 hrs.
- **Afternoon hours:** Wed/Sat/Sun 2:00–6:00 PM (daily during school holidays).
- **Family cost estimate** (2 adults + 2 kids, all renting skates): ~€28.90.

### 2. Le Bowl — bowling 🎳
- **Address:** 9 boulevard du Fier, 74000 Annecy (free on-site parking)
- **Why:** 16 lanes + restaurant; ground floor is wheelchair-accessible and kid-friendly. (The nightclub only opens late Fri/Sat, so afternoons are firmly family time.)
- **Prices:** Adult **€8/game**, child **€6/game** (~30–45 min per game).
- **Afternoon hours:** Opens 2:00 PM daily.
- **Family cost estimate** (2 adults + 2 kids, one game each): ~€28.

### 3. Pathé Annecy — cinema 🎬
- **Location:** Town centre, near Bonlieu; laser digital projection, ~8 screens.
- **Why:** Reliable rainy-day fallback with *films jeune public* and regular kids' screenings on Wednesdays and weekends.
- **Prices:** Full **€9–12**, reduced **€6–8** (under-14/18, students). Morning matinees cheaper.
- **Family cost estimate** (2 adults + 2 kids): roughly €30–40 depending on the session.

### Suggested plan
Start with **skating at Patinoire Jean Régis** (2–4 PM), then a short hop to **Le Bowl** for a couple of games, or wind down at **Pathé** for an afternoon kids' screening. All-indoor, so the rain never matters.

**A note on prices:** The figures above are the indicative rates published on loisirs74.fr. Bowling and skating prices are listed concretely; the cinema is given as a range, and I'd treat those as guidance rather than a guaranteed quote — worth confirming on each venue's official page before you go.

One more option from the site if you want a fourth idea: **Atome Climbing** (indoor climbing, welcomes families with kids ~6+), but loisirs74.fr only lists an approximate €15–20 entry and flags that 2026 prices need confirmation — so I left it out of the firm quotes above.

Web search results for query: "loisirs74.fr fiche lieu"

Links: [{"title":"Parc de l'Impérial · Annecy (74) | Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/parc-imperial-annecy"},{"title":"Plan d'eau Biotope de Combloux — Baignade biologique en Haute-Savoie | Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/baignade-biotope-combloux"},{"title":"Les 4 Nemours — Cinéma à Annecy, Haute-Savoie | Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/cinema-les-4-nemours-annecy"},{"title":"Télécabine Panoramic Mont-Blanc - Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/telecabine-panoramic-mont-blanc"},{"title":"Muséum des Papillons et Insectes","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/museum-des-papillons-et-insectes-faverges"},{"title":"Yaute Canyon — Canyoning Aravis & Annecy | Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/canyoning-yaute-canyon"},{"title":"Plage de Talloires · GRATUIT · 2026 - Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/nl/plage-de-talloires"},{"title":"Aquariaz · Tarifs et horaires officiels (Avoriaz) - Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/nl/aquariaz"},{"title":"Plage de Saint-Jorioz · Tarife und Öffnungszeiten (74)","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/de/plage-de-saint-jorioz"},{"title":"Compagnie des Bateaux du Lac d'Annecy · 2026 - Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/nl/croisiere-bateaux-annecy-annecy"}]

Voici les résultats de la recherche pour « loisirs74.fr fiche lieu ». Loisirs 74 est un site qui recense des lieux et activités de loisirs en Haute-Savoie (74), avec des fiches détaillées par lieu. Voici un aperçu des fiches trouvées :

## Sites de baignade et lieux nature

**Parc de l'Impérial · Annecy** — L'accès au Parc de l'Impérial (officiellement Parc Charles Bosson) est libre et gratuit toute l'année. C'est un jardin public ouvert toute l'année, accessible 24h/24, sans clôture ni horaires de fermeture.

**Plan d'eau Biotope de Combloux** — Le premier site de baignade biologique ouvert au public en France, inauguré en 2002 et entièrement réhabilité en 2022. Avec un bassin de 2 900 m³, l'eau y est filtrée naturellement par plus de 10 000 plantes aquatiques réparties dans quatre bassins interconnectés, sans aucun produit chimique.

**Plage de Talloires** — Fiche indiquant que le tarif 2026 est gratuit (anciennement payante à 2,50 €), avec une surveillance MNS du 20 juin au 30 août 2026 (10h-19h).

**Plage de Saint-Jorioz** — Le seul grand plage naturelle du lac d'Annecy, avec accès payant en juillet-août : adulte (18 ans et plus) : 2,60 € ; enfant 10-17 ans : 1 € ; moins de 10 ans : gratuit.

## Activités et loisirs

**Aquariaz (Avoriaz)** — Un parc aquatique tropical au cœur de la station sans voiture d'Avoriaz, à 1 800 m d'altitude dans le massif du Chablais. Le complexe ouvert en 2012 s'étend sur 2 400 m² de bassins couverts et extérieurs.

**Yaute Canyon** — Un bureau de moniteurs spécialisé dans le canyoning autour d'Annecy et dans le massif des Aravis.

**Télécabine Panoramic Mont-Blanc** — Une remontée mécanique transfrontalière entre la France et l'Italie, reliant le sommet du téléphérique de l'Aiguille du Midi (3 777 m) à la pointe Helbronner (3 466 m, Italie) en environ 30 minutes.

## Culture

**Les 4 Nemours · Annecy** — Cinéma d'art et d'essai classé en plein centre d'Annecy : 4 salles dédiées aux films d'auteur, documentaires, classiques restaurés et jeune public en VO.

**Muséum des Papillons et Insectes · Faverges** — Une collection exceptionnelle de plus de 5 000 papillons et insectes des 5 continents. C'est le seul muséum de ce type en Savoie et Haute-Savoie, et l'un des trois seulement en France.

**Compagnie des Bateaux du Lac d'Annecy** — Opérateur de croisières qui, selon le site officiel, a atteint fin 2024 l'objectif d'une flotte 100 % électrique ou hybride — le premier exploitant de croisières français du secteur à y parvenir.

Chaque fiche du site propose des informations pratiques (tarifs, horaires, accessibilité, accès transports) vérifiées à partir de sources multiples comme DataTourisme, Apidae Tourisme et Haute-Savoie Tourisme. Si vous cherchez une fiche de lieu précise, n'hésitez pas à me préciser laquelle et je pourrai affiner la recherche.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

results:
Voici les résultats de la recherche pour « loisirs74.fr fiche lieu ». Loisirs 74 est un site qui recense des lieux et activités de loisirs en Haute-Savoie (74), avec des fiches détaillées par lieu. Voici un aperçu des fiches trouvées :

## Sites de baignade et lieux nature

**Parc de l'Impérial · Annecy** — L'accès au Parc de l'Impérial (officiellement Parc Charles Bosson) est libre et gratuit toute l'année. C'est un jardin public ouvert toute l'année, accessible 24h/24, sans clôture ni horaires de fermeture.

**Plan d'eau Biotope de Combloux** — Le premier site de baignade biologique ouvert au public en France, inauguré en 2002 et entièrement réhabilité en 2022. Avec un bassin de 2 900 m³, l'eau y est filtrée naturellement par plus de 10 000 plantes aquatiques réparties dans quatre bassins interconnectés, sans aucun produit chimique.

**Plage de Talloires** — Fiche indiquant que le tarif 2026 est gratuit (anciennement payante à 2,50 €), avec une surveillance MNS du 20 juin au 30 août 2026 (10h-19h).

**Plage de Saint-Jorioz** — Le seul grand plage naturelle du lac d'Annecy, avec accès payant en juillet-août : adulte (18 ans et plus) : 2,60 € ; enfant 10-17 ans : 1 € ; moins de 10 ans : gratuit.

## Activités et loisirs

**Aquariaz (Avoriaz)** — Un parc aquatique tropical au cœur de la station sans voiture d'Avoriaz, à 1 800 m d'altitude dans le massif du Chablais. Le complexe ouvert en 2012 s'étend sur 2 400 m² de bassins couverts et extérieurs.

**Yaute Canyon** — Un bureau de moniteurs spécialisé dans le canyoning autour d'Annecy et dans le massif des Aravis.

**Télécabine Panoramic Mont-Blanc** — Une remontée mécanique transfrontalière entre la France et l'Italie, reliant le sommet du téléphérique de l'Aiguille du Midi (3 777 m) à la pointe Helbronner (3 466 m, Italie) en environ 30 minutes.

## Culture

**Les 4 Nemours · Annecy** — Cinéma d'art et d'essai classé en plein centre d'Annecy : 4 salles dédiées aux films d'auteur, documentaires, classiques restaurés et jeune public en VO.

**Muséum des Papillons et Insectes · Faverges** — Une collection exceptionnelle de plus de 5 000 papillons et insectes des 5 continents. C'est le seul muséum de ce type en Savoie et Haute-Savoie, et l'un des trois seulement en France.

**Compagnie des Bateaux du Lac d'Annecy** — Opérateur de croisières qui, selon le site officiel, a atteint fin 2024 l'objectif d'une flotte 100 % électrique ou hybride — le premier exploitant de croisières français du secteur à y parvenir.

Chaque fiche du site propose des informations pratiques (tarifs, horaires, accessibilité, accès transports) vérifiées à partir de sources multiples comme DataTourisme, Apidae Tourisme et Haute-Savoie Tourisme. Si vous cherchez une fiche de lieu précise, n'hésitez pas à me préciser laquelle et je pourrai affiner la recherche.

content.text: Let me pick the Parc de l'Impérial fiche and fetch its raw HTML to inspect the JSON-LD / schema.org data. I'll try curl for the raw markup.

input.description: Fetch raw HTML of the fiche

content.text: Got the raw HTML. Let me extract the JSON-LD structured data blocks.

input.command:
cd /tmp/axis-oXqby7/work; grep -o 'application/ld+json' fiche.html | wc -l; echo "---count of ld+json blocks above---"; python3 - <<'PY'
import re,html
data=open('fiche.html',encoding='utf-8').read()
blocks=re.findall(r'<script[^>]*type="application/ld\+json"[^>]*>(.*?)</script>', data, re.S|re.I)
print("blocks found:",len(blocks))
import json
for i,b in enumerate(blocks):
    b2=html.unescape(b).strip()
    try:
        j=json.loads(b2)
        print(f"\n===== BLOCK {i} =====")
        print(json.dumps(j,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)[:4000])
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"\n===== BLOCK {i} (raw, parse err {e}) =====")
        print(b2[:2000])
PY

content.text:
I have everything needed. Here's the report.

## Fiche examined
**Parc de l'Impérial · Annecy** — https://loisirs74.fr/parc-imperial-annecy

## Schema.org structured data exposed

The page embeds **one** `<script type="application/ld+json">` block using `@context: "https://schema.org"` with an **`@graph`** array containing **four** linked entities:

| # | `@type` | Purpose |
|---|---------|---------|
| 1 | **`WebSite`** | Site-level node (`#website`), name "Loisirs 74", `inLanguage: fr-FR` |
| 2 | **`BreadcrumbList`** | 3-item breadcrumb: Accueil → Bases de loisirs → Parc de l'Impérial |
| 3 | **`TouristAttraction`** | The place fiche itself (`#place`) — the core node |
| 4 | **`FAQPage`** | Q&A pairs (`Question`/`Answer`) about pricing, hours, swimming |

The `TouristAttraction` node is the rich one. It carries:
- `name`, `alternateName` (["Parc Charles Bosson", "Impérial"]), `description`, `url`
- **`PostalAddress`** — Annecy, 74000, Haute-Savoie, FR
- `isAccessibleForFree: true`, `publicAccess: true`
- **`GeoCoordinates`** (`geo`) — the GPS data
- **`amenityFeature`** — 7 `LocationFeatureSpecification` entries (Accès libre, Bancs, Volière, Roseraie, Massifs fleuris, Allées accessibles, Aire ouverte sur le lac)

Note: `image` is present but empty (`""`).

## Extracted GPS coordinates

From the `geo` / `GeoCoordinates` object:

```json
"geo": {
  "@type": "GeoCoordinates",
  "latitude": 45.903592,
  "longitude": 6.143566
}
```

- **Latitude:** `45.903592`
- **Longitude:** `6.143566`

That point places the park on the western shore of Lake Annecy, consistent with the `PostalAddress` (Annecy, 74000).

This was a read-only fetch and inspection — no forms submitted, no bookings made.

Sources: [Parc de l'Impérial · Annecy | Loisirs 74](https://loisirs74.fr/parc-imperial-annecy)

entries.toolResultText:
Web search results for query: "loisirs74.fr fiche lieu"

Links: [{"title":"Parc de l'Impérial · Annecy (74) | Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/parc-imperial-annecy"},{"title":"Plan d'eau Biotope de Combloux — Baignade biologique en Haute-Savoie | Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/baignade-biotope-combloux"},{"title":"Les 4 Nemours — Cinéma à Annecy, Haute-Savoie | Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/cinema-les-4-nemours-annecy"},{"title":"Télécabine Panoramic Mont-Blanc - Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/telecabine-panoramic-mont-blanc"},{"title":"Muséum des Papillons et Insectes","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/museum-des-papillons-et-insectes-faverges"},{"title":"Yaute Canyon — Canyoning Aravis & Annecy | Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/canyoning-yaute-canyon"},{"title":"Plage de Talloires · GRATUIT · 2026 - Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/nl/plage-de-talloires"},{"title":"Aquariaz · Tarifs et horaires officiels (Avoriaz) - Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/nl/aquariaz"},{"title":"Plage de Saint-Jorioz · Tarife und Öffnungszeiten (74)","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/de/plage-de-saint-jorioz"},{"title":"Compagnie des Bateaux du Lac d'Annecy · 2026 - Loisirs 74","url":"https://loisirs74.fr/nl/croisiere-bateaux-annecy-annecy"}]

Voici les résultats de la recherche pour « loisirs74.fr fiche lieu ». Loisirs 74 est un site qui recense des lieux et activités de loisirs en Haute-Savoie (74), avec des fiches détaillées par lieu. Voici un aperçu des fiches trouvées :

## Sites de baignade et lieux nature

**Parc de l'Impérial · Annecy** — L'accès au Parc de l'Impérial (officiellement Parc Charles Bosson) est libre et gratuit toute l'année. C'est un jardin public ouvert toute l'année, accessible 24h/24, sans clôture ni horaires de fermeture.

**Plan d'eau Biotope de Combloux** — Le premier site de baignade biologique ouvert au public en France, inauguré en 2002 et entièrement réhabilité en 2022. Avec un bassin de 2 900 m³, l'eau y est filtrée naturellement par plus de 10 000 plantes aquatiques réparties dans quatre bassins interconnectés, sans aucun produit chimique.

**Plage de Talloires** — Fiche indiquant que le tarif 2026 est gratuit (anciennement payante à 2,50 €), avec une surveillance MNS du 20 juin au 30 août 2026 (10h-19h).

**Plage de Saint-Jorioz** — Le seul grand plage naturelle du lac d'Annecy, avec accès payant en juillet-août : adulte (18 ans et plus) : 2,60 € ; enfant 10-17 ans : 1 € ; moins de 10 ans : gratuit.

## Activités et loisirs

**Aquariaz (Avoriaz)** — Un parc aquatique tropical au cœur de la station sans voiture d'Avoriaz, à 1 800 m d'altitude dans le massif du Chablais. Le complexe ouvert en 2012 s'étend sur 2 400 m² de bassins couverts et extérieurs.

**Yaute Canyon** — Un bureau de moniteurs spécialisé dans le canyoning autour d'Annecy et dans le massif des Aravis.

**Télécabine Panoramic Mont-Blanc** — Une remontée mécanique transfrontalière entre la France et l'Italie, reliant le sommet du téléphérique de l'Aiguille du Midi (3 777 m) à la pointe Helbronner (3 466 m, Italie) en environ 30 minutes.

## Culture

**Les 4 Nemours · Annecy** — Cinéma d'art et d'essai classé en plein centre d'Annecy : 4 salles dédiées aux films d'auteur, documentaires, classiques restaurés et jeune public en VO.

**Muséum des Papillons et Insectes · Faverges** — Une collection exceptionnelle de plus de 5 000 papillons et insectes des 5 continents. C'est le seul muséum de ce type en Savoie et Haute-Savoie, et l'un des trois seulement en France.

**Compagnie des Bateaux du Lac d'Annecy** — Opérateur de croisières qui, selon le site officiel, a atteint fin 2024 l'objectif d'une flotte 100 % électrique ou hybride — le premier exploitant de croisières français du secteur à y parvenir.

Chaque fiche du site propose des informations pratiques (tarifs, horaires, accessibilité, accès transports) vérifiées à partir de sources multiples comme DataTourisme, Apidae Tourisme et Haute-Savoie Tourisme. Si vous cherchez une fiche de lieu précise, n'hésitez pas à me préciser laquelle et je pourrai affiner la recherche.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

import re,html
data=open('fiche.html',encoding='utf-8').read()

print("blocks found:",len(blocks))
import json

        print(b2[:2000])

I have everything needed. Here's the report.

## Fiche examined
**Parc de l'Impérial · Annecy** — https://loisirs74.fr/parc-imperial-annecy

## Schema.org structured data exposed

The page embeds **one** `<script type="application/ld+json">` block using `@context: "https://schema.org"` with an **`@graph`** array containing **four** linked entities:

| # | `@type` | Purpose |

| 2 | **`BreadcrumbList`** | 3-item breadcrumb: Accueil → Bases de loisirs → Parc de l'Impérial |
| 3 | **`TouristAttraction`** | The place fiche itself (`#place`) — the core node |
| 4 | **`FAQPage`** | Q&A pairs (`Question`/`Answer`) about pricing, hours, swimming |

The `TouristAttraction` node is the rich one. It carries:
- `name`, `alternateName` (["Parc Charles Bosson", "Impérial"]), `description`, `url`
- **`PostalAddress`** — Annecy, 74000, Haute-Savoie, FR
- `isAccessibleForFree: true`, `publicAccess: true`
- **`GeoCoordinates`** (`geo`) — the GPS data
- **`amenityFeature`** — 7 `LocationFeatureSpecification` entries (Accès libre, Bancs, Volière, Roseraie, Massifs fleuris, Allées accessibles, Aire ouverte sur le lac)

Note: `image` is present but empty (`""`).

## Extracted GPS coordinates

From the `geo` / `GeoCoordinates` object:

```json
"geo": {
  "@type": "GeoCoordinates",
  "latitude": 45.903592,
  "longitude": 6.143566

```

- **Longitude:** `6.143566`

That point places the park on the western shore of Lake Annecy, consistent with the `PostalAddress` (Annecy, 74000).

This was a read-only fetch and inspection — no forms submitted, no bookings made.

## Fiche examined
**Parc de l'Impérial · Annecy** — https://loisirs74.fr/parc-imperial-annecy

## Schema.org structured data exposed

The page embeds **one** `<script type="application/ld+json">` block using `@context: "https://schema.org"` with an **`@graph`** array containing **four** linked entities:

| # | `@type` | Purpose |
|---|---------|---------|
| 1 | **`WebSite`** | Site-level node (`#website`), name "Loisirs 74", `inLanguage: fr-FR` |
| 2 | **`BreadcrumbList`** | 3-item breadcrumb: Accueil → Bases de loisirs → Parc de l'Impérial |
| 3 | **`TouristAttraction`** | The place fiche itself (`#place`) — the core node |
| 4 | **`FAQPage`** | Q&A pairs (`Question`/`Answer`) about pricing, hours, swimming |

The `TouristAttraction` node is the rich one. It carries:
- `name`, `alternateName` (["Parc Charles Bosson", "Impérial"]), `description`, `url`
- **`PostalAddress`** — Annecy, 74000, Haute-Savoie, FR
- `isAccessibleForFree: true`, `publicAccess: true`
- **`GeoCoordinates`** (`geo`) — the GPS data
- **`amenityFeature`** — 7 `LocationFeatureSpecification` entries (Accès libre, Bancs, Volière, Roseraie, Massifs fleuris, Allées accessibles, Aire ouverte sur le lac)

Note: `image` is present but empty (`""`).

## Extracted GPS coordinates

From the `geo` / `GeoCoordinates` object:

```json
"geo": {
  "@type": "GeoCoordinates",
  "latitude": 45.903592,
  "longitude": 6.143566
}
```

- **Latitude:** `45.903592`
- **Longitude:** `6.143566`

That point places the park on the western shore of Lake Annecy, consistent with the `PostalAddress` (Annecy, 74000).

This was a read-only fetch and inspection — no forms submitted, no bookings made.

Sources: [Parc de l'Impérial · Annecy | Loisirs 74](https://loisirs74.fr/parc-imperial-annecy)
